Document:
# Basic Topicals Basic topicals are made in the techfab, or in the case of Gauze can also be crafted by hand.
## Brutepack
- 0.25 steel & 0.25 plastic - Heals [color=green]5 Blunt, Piercing and Slash[/color]
## Ointment
- 0.25 glass & 0.25 plastic - Heals [color=green]5 Heat, Cold, and Shock and 1.5 Caustic[/color]
## Gauze
- 1 cloth, or 2 when made by hand - Heals [color=green]10 Piercing, 5 Slash and stops bleeding[/color]
## Bloodpack
- Cannot be crafted - Heals [color=green]0.5 bloodloss and restores ~5% blood volume[/color]
## Tourniquet
- Cannot be crafted - Does [color=red]5 Blunt and 5 Asphyxiation damage[/color] - [color=green]Stops bleeding. Much faster to apply than Gauze.[/color]
# Advanced Topicals Advanced topicals must be made in the microwave.
- Heals [color=green]10 Blunt, Piercing, Slash and stops bleeding[/color]
- Heals [color=green]10 Heat, Cold, Shock and Caustic[/color]
- Heals the same as Brutepacks
- Heals the same as Ointment
